requirement_topic.en: Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment Type Approval (RATEL)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电/电信终端设备型式核准（RATEL）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電/電信終端設備型式核准（RATEL）

summary.en: All radio equipment and telecom terminal equipment placed on the Serbian market requires a mandatory RATEL type approval certificate under Serbia's Electronic Communications Act. CE Declaration of Conformity alone is NOT accepted as a substitute for RATEL certification. EU-harmonised test reports (EN / ETSI standards) are accepted by RATEL as the technical basis for the application, creating a 'CE-lite' pathway: test to EN standards, then obtain a separate RATEL certificate. CCC is not recognised in Serbia.
summary.zh: 在塞尔维亚市场销售的所有无线电设备和电信终端设备，须依据《电子通信法》取得RATEL强制型式核准证书。CE符合性声明单独不能替代RATEL认证。欧盟协调检测报告（EN/ETSI标准）可作为RATEL申请的技术依据，形成「类CE」路径：按EN标准测试，再另行取得RATEL证书。CCC认证在塞尔维亚不被认可。
summary.zht: 在塞爾維亞市場銷售的所有無線電設備和電信終端設備，須依據《電子通訊法》取得RATEL強制型式核准證書。CE符合性聲明單獨不能替代RATEL認證。歐盟協調測試報告（EN/ETSI標準）可作為RATEL申請的技術依據，形成「類CE」路徑：按EN標準測試，再另行取得RATEL證書。CCC認證在塞爾維亞不被認可。

standards_or_laws: Law on Electronic Communications (Republic of Serbia, Official Gazette No. 44/10, 60/13, 62/14, 95/18, 91/19)
RATEL Rulebook on Type Approval of Radio Equipment and Telecom Terminal Equipment
SRPS EN 300 328 V2.2.2 (2.4 GHz Wi-Fi / BT wideband data)

summary.en: China requires SRRC radio type approval (MIIT) for all intentional radio transmitters and a separate MIIT Network Access License (NAL / 进网许可证) for telecom terminal equipment connected to public networks. Applicable GB standards include GB/T 9254.1-2021 and GB 17625.1-2022 for EMC. CCC applies to in-scope products under the RF / electrical safety catalogue.
summary.zh: 中国要求所有有意无线电发射设备取得工业和信息化部下属无线电管理局（SRRC）无线电型式核准，接入公共网络的电信终端设备须另行取得工业和信息化部进网许可证（NAL）。电磁兼容适用GB标准（GB/T 9254.1-2021、GB 17625.1-2022）。目录内产品须取得CCC认证（涵盖射频/电气安全）。
summary.zht: 中國要求所有有意無線電發射設備取得工業和信息化部下屬無線電管理局（SRRC）無線電型式核准，接入公共網路的電信終端設備須另行取得工業和信息化部進網許可證（NAL）。電磁相容適用GB標準（GB/T 9254.1-2021、GB 17625.1-2022）。目錄內產品須取得CCC認證（涵蓋射頻/電氣安全）。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval — 无线电发射设备型号核准 (MIIT Order No. 14, 2019)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — 电信设备进网许可管理办法 (MIIT Order No. 2, 2017)
GB/T 9254.1-2021 (Information technology equipment — radio disturbance characteristics)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (GB 4943.1, GB 9254 scope)

gap.en: A new RATEL type approval certificate is required for Serbia — SRRC approval and CCC marks are not recognised. EN/ETSI test reports generated for CE marking can be reused in the RATEL application to avoid duplicative radio and EMC testing, but cannot substitute the certificate itself. The MIIT NAL scope (public network access) does not map to RATEL's equipment type approval framework.
gap.zh: 塞尔维亚要求重新取得RATEL型式核准证书，SRRC核准及CCC标志均不被认可。为CE标志而生成的EN/ETSI检测报告可在RATEL申请中复用，以避免重复的无线电和电磁兼容测试，但不能替代证书本身。MIIT进网许可证范围（公共网络接入）与RATEL设备型式核准框架不对应。
gap.zht: 塞爾維亞要求重新取得RATEL型式核准證書，SRRC核准及CCC標誌均不被認可。為CE標誌而生成的EN/ETSI測試報告可在RATEL申請中複用，以避免重複的無線電和電磁相容測試，但不能替代證書本身。MIIT進網許可證範圍（公共網路接入）與RATEL設備型式核准框架不對應。

source.publisher: RATEL — Regulatory Agency for Electronic Communications and Postal Services (Serbia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A separate RATEL type approval certificate is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment placed on the Serbian market. CE DoC alone is not sufficient. EN/ETSI test data generated for EU/CE purposes may be reused in the RATEL application but does not substitute for the RATEL certificate. CCC is not recognised. Verify current RATEL requirements with RATEL directly or through a qualified local representative.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在塞尔维亚市场销售的所有无线电和电信终端设备，强制要求另行取得RATEL型式核准证书。CE符合性声明单独不满足要求。为欧盟/CE目的生成的EN/ETSI测试数据可在RATEL申请中复用，但不能替代RATEL证书。CCC认证不被认可。请直接向RATEL或合格本地代表核实现行RATEL要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在塞爾維亞市場銷售的所有無線電和電信終端設備，強制要求另行取得RATEL型式核准證書。CE符合性聲明單獨不滿足要求。為歐盟/CE目的生成的EN/ETSI測試數據可在RATEL申請中複用，但不能替代RATEL證書。CCC認證不被認可。請直接向RATEL或合格本地代表核實現行RATEL要求。
